stemHtml: Why is it important to have accurate information about the airplane mass and CG position during flight?

options.a: allow airlines to better compute navigation and route charges.
options.b: allow selection of the real, optimum cruising flight level.
options.c: are only required for take-off and landing, to comply with loadsheet requirements.
options.d: are unimportant since all performance decisions are based on expected masses on the operational flight plan.
